issue.description: Creates an issue or, where the option to create subtasks is enabled in Jira, a subtask

issueAttachment.description: Add, remove, and get an attachment from an issue

issueComment.description: Get, create, update, and delete a comment from an issue

user.description: Get, create and delete a user

notify.description: Create an email notification for an issue and add it to the mail queue

transitions.description: Return either all transitions or a transition that can be performed by the user on an issue, based on the issue's status

componentIds.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

fieldValue.description: Value of the field to set
Value of the field to set

labels.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

updateHistory.description: Whether the project in which the issue is created is added to the user's Recently viewed project list, as shown under Projects in Jira. This also populates the JQL issues search lastViewed field.

expand.description: Include more information about the user

fields.description: A list of fields to return for the issue. This parameter accepts a comma-separated list. Use it to retrieve a subset of fields. Allowed values: *all Returns all fields. *navigable Returns navigable fields. Any issue field, prefixed with a minus to exclude.

fieldsByKey.description: Whether fields in fields are referenced by keys rather than IDs. This parameter is useful where fields have been added by a connect app and a field's key may differ from its ID.

properties.description: A list of issue properties to return for the issue. This parameter accepts a comma-separated list. Allowed values: *all Returns all issue properties. Any issue property key, prefixed with a minus to exclude. Examples: *all Returns all properties. *all,-prop1 Returns all properties except prop1. prop1,prop2 Returns prop1 and prop2 properties. This parameter may be specified multiple times. For example, properties=prop1,prop2& properties=prop3.

htmlBody.description: The HTML body of the email notification for the issue

subject.description: The subject of the email notification for the issue. If this is not specified, then the subject is set to the issue key and summary.

textBody.description: The subject of the email notification for the issue. If this is not specified, then the subject is set to the issue key and summary.

skipRemoteOnlyCondition.description: Whether transitions with the condition Hide From User Condition are included in the response

password.description: Password for the user. If a password is not set, a random password is generated.

notification.description: Whether to send the user an email confirmation that they have been added to Jira

fieldValue.description: Value of the field to set
Value of the field to set

labels.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

simplifyOutput.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

expand.description: Use expand to include additional information about comments in the response. This parameter accepts Rendered Body, which returns the comment body rendered in HTML.

fields.description: A list of fields to return for each issue, use it to retrieve a subset of fields. This parameter accepts a comma-separated list. Expand options include: *all Returns all fields. *navigable Returns navigable fields. Any issue field, prefixed with a minus to exclude.

fieldsByKey.description: Whether fields in fields are referenced by keys rather than IDs. This parameter is useful where fields have been added by a connect app and a field's key may differ from its ID.

wikiMarkup.description: Whether to enable parsing of wikiformatting for this comment. Default is false.

orderBy.description: Order comments by the created date

notificationRecipientsUi.description: The recipients of the email notification for the issue

reporter.description: Whether the notification should be sent to the issue's reporter

assignee.description: Whether the notification should be sent to the issue's assignees

watchers.description: Whether the notification should be sent to the issue's assignees

voters.description: Whether the notification should be sent to the issue's voters

users.description: List of users to receive the notification. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

groups.description: List of groups to receive the notification. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

notificationRecipientsRestrictionsUi.description: Restricts the notifications to users with the specified permissions

commentJson.description: The Atlassian Document Format (ADF). Online builder can be found here.

accountId.description: Account ID of the user to retrieve
